Name: testuser
Content: Seriously, tldraw is the fastest way to sketch out an idea I've ever used. I went from blank canvas to a full wireframe concept in under 5 minutes. The developer experience is incredible. 🤯

Name: Jane Foster
Content: The fact that tldraw is performant even on mobile is a huge selling point. Being able to access and edit my whiteboard on the fly without lag is essential. Great work by the team! 👏

Name: Kenji Aoki
Content: Tldraw is just the best whiteboard on the web. Period.

Name: Marcus Hill
Content: Forget complex diagramming tools. tldraw is my new favorite for quick meeting sketches, user flow diagrams, and impromptu brainstorming sessions. It's simple enough for anyone, powerful enough for everything.

Name: Chloe Bell
Content: Zero friction diagramming. My new default tool. Love the API!

Name: Sarah Lee
Content: Integrating tldraw into my internal tool was shockingly easy. The component API is clean, and the ability to customize the UI is a game changer. Open source wins again! 🙌
